issues.detail: The skill file only covers happy path scenarios and does not address error handling or edge cases.
Installation script is fetched via curl without verifying a checksum.

scenarios.name: sync-successful-commands-fuzzy-search
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A only provides installation steps.

scenarios.name: import-history-directory-filter-stats
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the exact --cwd search syntax, while Response B misses several key requirements.
